title: Like banks , leadership rotation rule may apply to large NBFCs
summary: A report said the RBI may extend bank-style leadership rotation rules to large NBFCs, raising succession questions for Bajaj Finance's long-serving management.

title: Sensex , Nifty slide sharply by midday ; Bajaj Finance , M & M lead selloff as banking , auto drag
summary: Bajaj Finance led the Sensex selloff at midday as banking and auto stocks dragged indices lower amid geopolitical tensions.

title: Shriram Finance rises on report RBI is not mulling leadership curbs for non - bank lenders
summary: NBFC shares including Bajaj Finance rose after a report that the RBI is not considering leadership tenure curbs for non-bank lenders.

title: RBI के पास कोई प्रस्ताव नहीं , चमक गए Shriram Finance और Bajaj Finance के शेयर
summary: Bajaj Finance and Shriram Finance shares rallied after the RBI was reported to have no proposal to cap NBFC leadership tenures.

title: Rs 1 lakh crore wiped off ! Bajaj Finance shares tumble 18 % in March so far amid raging Iran - US war
summary: Bajaj Finance shares fell about 18% in March, erasing roughly Rs 1 lakh crore of market value amid the Iran-US war driven selloff.

title: MC Exclusive | Want Bajaj Finance to be known as a tech company in finance biz , say Rajeev Jain , VC & MD
summary: Rajeev Jain, VC & MD, said Bajaj Finance wants to be known as a technology company in the finance business.

title: FY27 will be a do - or - die year for AI transformation : Rajeev Jain , VC & MD , Bajaj Finance
summary: Rajeev Jain said FY27 will be a do-or-die year for Bajaj Finance's AI transformation.

title: Bajaj Finance shares : Why stock fell 20 % in a month ; valuation not compelling , says MOFSL
summary: Motilal Oswal said Bajaj Finance's valuation is not compelling after the stock fell 20% in a month.

title: HDFC Bank , ICICI Bank , SBI , Bajaj Finance , Kotak Bank shares offer up to 41 % upside ; fresh target prices
summary: Brokerages issued fresh target prices implying up to 41% upside for large financials including Bajaj Finance.

title: For Tata Capital , narrowing profitability gap with Bajaj Finance is a tough task
summary: An analysis said Tata Capital faces a tough task narrowing its profitability gap with Bajaj Finance, underscoring Bajaj Finance's sector-leading returns.

title: MC Exclusive | Two insiders could be in the running to fill CEO role ; list could go to RBI by August
summary: A report said two internal candidates are in the running for the CEO role, with a shortlist expected to go to the RBI by August.

title: Stock in Focus : ₹10000 करोड़ जुटाने की योजना , बोर्ड ने भी दी खास मंजूरी , 3 वजहों से 29 जून को फोकस में रहेगा यह शेयर
summary: The board approved a plan to raise Rs 10,000 crore, putting the stock in focus ahead of the June 29 session.

summary: A market expert discussed entry and profit-booking levels for a two-year investment in Bajaj Finance.
